case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO PINOT

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PINOT, OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED OCT-09-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PINOT, OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINOT, OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,395.28 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PINOT, OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PINOT, OMAR EDUARDO ROMERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
